NFL Elo Dashboard
2024 Regular Season
Leaderboard • • Team

About

This NFL Elo dashboard was created by me (a student at West Chester University of Pennsylvania) for the purposes of practicing and demonstrating what I've learned about full-stack development. This project pulls season data, stores it, computes Elo ratings, and generates a clean website with charts that are easy to browse.

Elo Formula

\[ E = \frac{1}{1 + 10^{\frac{OppElo - TeamElo}{400}}} \] \[ NewElo = OldElo + K \cdot (Result - E) \] \[ Result \in \{1, 0.5, 0\} \]
Season 2024 About • Contact • GitHub
